title: EGI Revamp Battle
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:EGI Revamp Battle}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=5 |name=EGI Revamp Battle |icon=EGI Revamp Battle icon.png |tickername=EGI Revamp Battle |shortname=EGI: RB |image=EGI Revamp Battle.png |type=Online |team_number=24 |series=EGI Revamp Battle |organizer=Ebullient Gaming India |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/ebullientgaming/ |sponsor=[https://www.instagram.com/redbullindia/ Red Bull India] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=80,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-08-01 |edate=2021-08-05 |twitter= |instagram=ebullientgaming |web=https://www.ebullientgaming.com/ |discord=D2HZsN6 |facebook=Ebullientgaming |youtube=c/EbullientGamingIndia }} '''[https://www.instagram.com/ebullientgaming/ Ebullient Gaming India]''' in association with '''[https://www.instagram.com/redbullindia/ Red Bull India]''' present a Battlegrounds Mobile invitational tournament for India called the '''EGI Revamp Battle''' with a prize pool of ₹80,000 INR ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position= Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Mayavi|b1flag=in |b1name=Shubham Chawla |b2=Spero|b2name=Piyush Bathla|b2flag=in }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''EGI Revamp Battle:''' 1st August 2021 to 5th August 2021.'' Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]], and [[Sanhok]]. '''''League Stage''': 1st August to 4th August 2021''. * 24 Invited teams have been divided into 3 groups (A, B, and C) * Teams will play against each other in a round-robin format. * 12 Matches to be played over a period of 4 days. * {{bgcolortext|up|'' Top 16 teams}} advance to the '''''Grand-Finals'''''.
'''''Grand-Finals''': 5th August 2021''. * 16 Qualified teams from the League Stage will play in the '''''Grand-Finals'''''. * Teams will face off in a total of 5 matches to determine the winner ====Matchdays==== * ''5 Matchdays: 3 Matches each day and 5 Matches on Grand Finals Day.'' ** '''''Sunday''''': ''3x ABC (E>>M>>E)'' ** '''''Monday''''': ''3x BCD (E>>M>>E)'' ** '''''Tuesday''''': ''3x CDA (E>>M>>E)'' ** '''''Thursday''''': ''3x DAB (E>>M>>E)'' ** '''''Friday''''': ''5 Matches Back to Back (E>>M>>S>>E>>M)'' ====Points Distribution==== {{MatchScoringPointsTable |{{Json|place=1|points=15|place2=6 |points2=4}} |{{Json|place=2|points=12|place2=7 |points2=2}} |{{Json|place=3|points=10|place2=8-12 |points2=1}} |{{Json|place=4|points=8 |place2=13-18|points2=0}} |{{Json|place=5|points=6 }} }} ===Prize Pool=== ₹80,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( $1078 {{Abbr/USD}} ) are spread among the teams and the players as seen below:
